spec_compliance.detail: Name is 93 characters, exceeds the 64-character limit

spec_compliance.rule: name: lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only

spec_compliance.detail: Description 'does stuff' is vague and provides no trigger context
No allowed-tools declared — agent has unrestricted tool access

security_findings.title: Hardcoded Anthropic API key
security_findings.detail: SKILL.md line 11 contains what appears to be an Anthropic API key in a curl command

security_findings.title: Hardcoded AWS credentials
security_findings.detail: SKILL.md line 19 contains an AWS Access Key ID set as an environment variable

security_findings.title: Destructive command in deploy script
security_findings.detail: scripts/deploy.sh contains 'rm -rf /' which would delete the entire filesystem

security_findings.title: Unrestricted Bash access
security_findings.detail: No allowed-tools declaration means the agent can run arbitrary commands

security_findings.title: External API access
security_findings.detail: Skill makes HTTP requests to api.example.com without documenting the trust relationship

best_practices.title: Vague description
best_practices.detail: Description 'does stuff' provides no context for when to trigger the skill

best_practices.title: No error handling beyond retry
best_practices.detail: The only error handling advice is 'try running it again'

judgment_findings.title: Skill poses serious security risk
judgment_findings.detail: The combination of hardcoded secrets, destructive commands, and unrestricted tool access makes this skill dangerous to use

grade_assessment: This skill has critical security vulnerabilities including hardcoded secrets and destructive commands, combined with specification violations.
grade_strengths: Has a scripts directory for executable code.
SKILL.md is concise and under 500 lines.
grade_improvements: Remove all hardcoded credentials and use environment variables or secrets management.
Remove the destructive 'rm -rf /' command from deploy.sh.
Add allowed-tools to restrict agent capabilities.
Rewrite the description to explain when and why to use this skill.
Shorten the name to under 64 characters.
